SCHEDULE
(Paragraphs 2 and 3)
AGREEMENT
The Credity Facility Agreement dated the 31st December, 1984, between
Bank of Zambia and Mcridien International Bank Limited facilitating the
refinancing of a sum of money in the principal amount of twelve million one
hundred and two thousand one hundred and sixty United States dollars
(US 812,102,160) which is about twenty-six million six hundred thousand kwa­
cha (K26,6D0,000).
